debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    intro x hx
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩ := hx
    calc x ≤ sSup D := le_sSup hxD
      _ ≤ sSup S := by
        obtain ⟨a, ha, haD, _⟩ := R.carrier_span.choose_spec
        sorry
  · apply sSup_le
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, ⟨hD, haD⟩, _⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    calc a = sSup D := haD
      _ ≤ sSup (decomposition_of_refinement R) := sSup_le_sSup fun x hx => by
        simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
        exact ⟨D, hD, hx⟩

apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    intro x hx
    simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨D', hD', haD'⟩, _⟩ := R.carrier_span _ (by
      have := R.carrier_span
      sorry)
    sorry
  · apply sSup_le
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, ⟨hD, haD⟩, _⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    rw [haD]
    apply sSup_le_sSup
    intro x hx
    simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]
    exact ⟨D, hD, hx⟩
sorry

    obtain ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩ := hx
    have : ∃ a ∈ S, a = sSup D := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      sorry
    sorry
  · obtain ⟨D, ⟨hD, hxD⟩, _⟩ := R.carrier_span x hx
    rw [hxD]

    exact ⟨D, hD, hy⟩
